More specifically, Diatrema purpurea is a perennial plant, characterized by its attractive purple flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is often found growing in rocky areas and dry soils, where it thrives in full sun conditions. It is valued for its ornamental value and is used in landscaping and gardening.
